choose.when: AND s.sale_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='MEMBERSHIP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS membership, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='GROUP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS groupClass, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='PT' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='LOCKER' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS locker, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='ITEM' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS items, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total FROM sale s

SELECT s.id, s.amount, s.payment_method AS paymentMethod, s.sale_date AS saleDate, s.memo, up.name AS memberName, p.name AS productName FROM sale s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE s.product_type=#{category}
ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale (user_id, product_id, product_name, product_type, amount, payment_method, sale_date, memo) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productType}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{saleDate}, #{memo})
